description_long: This object is a round, medium-sized pumpkin with a slightly flattened shape and a mottled surface featuring shades of brown and off-white. The exterior appears to be covered in a soft, fuzzy texture, giving it a plush or velvety look rather than the typical hard, ribbed surface of a real pumpkin. There are no visible carvings, stem, or decorative accessories present on its surface. The coloration is irregular, with darker brown bands and lighter patches distributed unevenly across the body. The overall form is symmetrical, and the pumpkin lacks any distinct facial features or cutouts. Its appearance suggests it could be a decorative or plush representation of a pumpkin rather than an actual vegetable.
description: A round, plush-textured pumpkin with mottled brown and off-white coloring and no visible carvings or stem.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded, plush surface with mottled brown and off-white coloring and no visible stem or carvings.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the elongated, oval profile and the symmetrical distribution of the mottled pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view is nearly identical to the front, with the same plush texture and color pattern, lacking any distinct features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the oval shape and the soft, fuzzy surface with no stem or carvings.
